name: web-research-mcp
description: AI-powered web research MCP server for agents. Supports web search, browse page, extract article. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets

tools.name: browse_page
tools.description: Browse a webpage using a headless Chromium browser (Playwright).

tools.name: extract_article
tools.description: Extract clean, readable article text from a URL. Strips navigation,

tools.name: research_topic
tools.description: Multi-step research workflow: search the web, then extract content from

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get current weather for a location using wttr.in (no API key needed).

tools.name: deep_research
tools.description: Autonomous multi-step research. Searches, reads pages, synthesizes findings.

tools.name: autonomous_research
tools.description: Run an autonomous multi-step research loop on a topic.
